title: Dropbox Collaborates with GitHub to Reduce Monorepo Size from 87GB to 20GB
summary: Dropbox reduced its backend monorepo from 87GB to 20GB by optimizing Git delta compression in collaboration with GitHub. The changes improved clone times, CI performance, and developer velocity, highlighting how repository storage inefficiencies can impact large-scale engineering workflows. By Leela Kumili

title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model V4 matters
summary: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. title: Cohere acquires, merges with Germany-based startup to create a ‘transatlantic AI powerhouse’
